SUBJECT:
FY 2019-20 FOURTH QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
SYNOPSIS
Staff submits the fourth quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments
BACKGROUND
The City Council adopted the FY 2019-20 budgets on June 5, 2019, with approved
General Fund revenues of $158.24 million and expenditures of $157.62 million. The City
adopted
budget for
all
funds

$485.75
million
